name: OpenAI Whisper (Speech-to-Text)
description: Transcribe audio files to text using OpenAI Whisper. Supports MP3, WAV, OGG, M4A, FLAC, WebM.

skill.name: openai_whisper
skill.description: Transcribe audio files to text using OpenAI Whisper
skill.system_prompt:
You have access to OpenAI Whisper for speech-to-text transcription.

Use transcribe_audio to convert audio files (MP3, WAV, OGG, M4A, FLAC, WebM) to text.
Supports multiple languages — auto-detected by default.
Max file size: 25MB.

tools.name: transcribe_audio
tools.description: Transcribe an audio file to text using OpenAI Whisper. Returns the transcription text.

audio_path.description: Path to the audio file (MP3, WAV, OGG, M4A, FLAC, WebM)

tools.handler:
#!/bin/bash
set -e

API_KEY="$VAR_OPENAI_API_KEY"
if [ -z "$API_KEY" ]; then
  echo '{"error": "OpenAI API key not configured. Set the openai_api_key variable."}'
  exit 0
fi

AUDIO_PATH="$ARG_AUDIO_PATH"
LANGUAGE="${ARG_LANGUAGE:-}"

if [ ! -f "$AUDIO_PATH" ]; then
  echo "{\"error\": \"Audio file not found: $AUDIO_PATH\"}"
  exit 0
fi

# Build curl command
CURL_ARGS="-s -X POST https://api.openai.com/v1/audio/transcriptions -H \"Authorization: Bearer $API_KEY\" -F \"model=whisper-1\" -F \"response_format=json\" -F \"file=@$AUDIO_PATH\""

if [ -n "$LANGUAGE" ]; then
  CURL_ARGS="$CURL_ARGS -F \"language=$LANGUAGE\""
fi

RESP=$(eval curl $CURL_ARGS)

# Extract text from JSON response
TEXT=$(echo "$RESP" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('text',''))" 2>/dev/null)

if [ -z "$TEXT" ]; then
  echo "{\"error\": \"Transcription failed\", \"details\": $(echo "$RESP" | python3 -c 'import sys,json; print(json.dumps(sys.stdin.read()[:500]))' 2>/dev/null || echo '"unknown"')}"
  exit 0
fi

echo "{\"text\": $(echo "$TEXT" | python3 -c 'import sys,json; print(json.dumps(sys.stdin.read().strip()))'), \"audio_file\": \"$AUDIO_PATH\"}"
